name: slot-art-creator-node
description: Generate, QA, and resize mobile slot machine art — symbols, UI, backgrounds, key art — with Nano Banana 2. Numbered slash-command workflow (/slot-step-00 through /slot-step-10), persistent project memory across sessions, key-art-anchored style consistency. Generation tools prefer Google Gemini (NB2), including nb2_smart_resize by default; fal.ai remains the fallback when only FAL_KEY is set and runs smart resize against a purpose-built NB Pro endpoint. Either key alone works. Node.js, no Python required.
